name: Durable State
objective: Make state transitions, leases, command replay, and projection delivery durable and recoverable in PostgreSQL.
scope: versioned PostgreSQL migrations for canonical state, events, leases, idempotency, outbox, checkpoints, and dead letters
transactional optimistic run and attempt persistence with immutable events
replay-safe commands and durable idempotency receipts
tenant- and repository-bound leases with database-clock expiry and fencing
competing outbox consumers using SKIP LOCKED and fenced claims
projection replay, corruption detection, backup, restore, and migration rollback
persistence interfaces that keep SQL outside policy logic
author: codex
independent_validator: GitHub Actions, CodeRabbit, and isolated Codex CLI review
